candidates.why: Direct total revenue line; exact top-line revenue label.
Also a top-line revenue label; values match Total Revenue, so useful as fallback across years.
Not revenue; this is a cost line and should not be used for REVT.

variables.notes: Use revenue labels as a priority list; both are valid top-line labels and appear duplicated with identical values.

candidates.why: Exact semantic match for cost of goods sold / cost of revenues.
Inventory asset component, not an income statement expense line.

variables.notes: Preferred the exact income statement COGS label even though preview values are blank, per instruction not to exclude present labels for blank preview cells.

candidates.why: Valid overhead bucket and populated; excludes D&A and finance items.
Selling-related overhead component, but appears to roll into Other operating expenses subtotal.
Component/sub-bucket under other operating expenses; using both with parent would risk overlap.
Personnel cost overhead component and populated.
Overhead-type compensation item, but appears included in Employee benefit expenses, so separate selection would risk double count.
Would be relevant if populated, but preview is empty and there is a broader SG&A label present.
Explicit SG&A-type label, but preview is empty.
Administrative overhead component, but preview is empty.
Could indicate personnel overhead, but preview is empty and Employee benefit expenses is more specific/populated.
Explicit SG&A row exists; per rules, include it even if mostly empty, and supplement with closest overhead buckets for coverage.
Operational statistic, not an expense row.

variables.notes: Included explicit SG&A row despite blank preview, plus closest populated overhead buckets for coverage across years. Excluded Marketing and Share-based payments to avoid double counting because they appear to be subcomponents of selected rows. Excluded depreciation/amortization and other non-overhead items.
No dedicated research/development line is visible on the income statement. Using empty mapping per missing data rule.

candidates.why: Broad finance cost line; usable fallback if dedicated interest expense is unavailable.
Too broad and not specifically interest expense.
Best dedicated interest expense line and populated.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expenses for Financial Assets and Liabilities Recognised at Fair Value
candidates.why: Narrow interest subcomponent, not preferred when broader Interest Expenses exists.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific lease-interest component only, not total interest expense.
Semantically correct alternative label; useful fallback though preview is blank.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest component, not total interest expense.

variables.notes: Priority list uses the dedicated interest line first, then alternate singular label, then broad financial expenses as last-resort fallback.

candidates.why: Income statement item, not book equity.
Income statement item, not shareholders' equity.
Equity component only, not total book equity.
Equity component only, not total book equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to the parent company shareholders
candidates.why: Best match because it is owner/parent equity and excludes minority interest.
Total equity including minority interest; not preferred when parent-only equity exists.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to the parent company shareholders

variables.notes: Selected parent-only equity to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Direct minority/non-controlling interest balance sheet label, but appears absent/zero in preview.
Income statement allocation line, not balance sheet minority equity.

candidates.row_label: Total Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest
candidates.why: Comprehensive income subtotal, not minority interest balance.
Total equity, not minority interest alone.

variables.notes: No non-controlling interest is evident. Total Equity & Minority Interest equals parent equity in the preview, indicating minority interest is effectively zero/absent.
